seoTitle: Uworra vs Vale Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Uworra and Vale Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Uworra vs Vale Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Uworra and Vale Park.
heading: Uworra vs Vale Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Uworra, South Australia and Vale Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Uworra has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Vale Park (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Uworra or Vale Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Uworra has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Vale Park scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Uworra scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Vale Park scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Uworra or Vale Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Uworra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
